background_template: {name} has been building things for other people since {founded}, out of {location}. Small team, no account managers, and a client list they'd rather show than describe. {quirk}
neighbourhoods: a shared floor in the old textile mill
two desks and a meeting room above the record shop
a studio at the back of the co-working space
the loft over the framers on Bridge Street
a unit in the converted tram depot
a corner of the enterprise hub
quirks: Every project ends with a handover document nobody reads and everybody keeps.
The studio dog has a job title and appears in more pitch decks than the founders.
They still send invoices with a hand-drawn thank-you doodle in the corner.
There is a wall of rejected logo concepts they call the museum of nearly.
Client calls happen at the big table because the meeting room became the plant room.
The founders met arguing about a typeface in someone else's comment section.
pains: prospects email asking what we actually do, which stings a bit
our services and prices live in a PDF nobody can ever find
people assume we only do logos, and we do rather more than logos
leads ring for a ballpark and we quote the same three packages every single time
our own site has said 'new site coming soon' since 2023, which is not a great look

products.name: Brand Identity Sprint
products.description: Two weeks. Logo, palette, type, and the rules for using them.

products.name: Social Media Kit
products.description: Templates your team can actually use without breaking them.

products.name: Landing Page Build
products.description: One page, fast, that says the thing and asks for the click.

products.name: E-commerce Setup
products.description: Shop, payments, shipping rules. Yours by the end.

products.name: Website Care Plan (Monthly)
products.description: Updates, backups, and someone to ring when it breaks.

products.name: SEO Audit
products.description: Where you rank, why, and what to do about it. No dark arts.

products.name: Analytics Setup & Training
products.description: Know what's working without needing us to translate.

products.name: Copywriting Day
products.description: A day of words from someone who does words for a living.

products.name: Pitch Deck Design
products.description: Your numbers, dressed for the room they're going into.

products.name: Illustration Pack
products.description: Six spot illustrations, drawn for you, owned by you.

products.name: Email Template Design
products.description: Newsletters that survive every inbox we could find.

products.name: Hosting & Domains (Annual)
products.description: The boring plumbing, handled and renewed on time.

products.name: Discovery Workshop
products.description: Half a day of the right questions before anyone designs anything.

awkward.name: Full Brand & Website Overhaul — Discovery, Identity, Design System, Build & Handover (6–8 Weeks)
awkward.description: The big one. Everything above, in the right order.

awkward.name: Website MOT & Speed Tune-Up
awkward.description: Waitlist only — we're booked through the quarter.

features.name: services listing
features.description: Everything we sell, with the price next to it. If people can see what things cost, the ballpark phone calls stop.

features.name: contact form
features.description: Name, email, what they need, rough budget. That's a brief, and briefs beat ballpark calls.

features.name: client testimonials
features.description: Two or three real quotes from clients. People trust other people, not us saying we're good.

features.name: FAQ section
features.description: The five questions every prospect asks, answered once, on the page.

features.name: service filter
features.description: Let people narrow to just branding, or just web. Nobody needs all of it at once.

features.name: navigation
features.description: A way to move around the page. We will absolutely judge it, but keep it simple.

constraints: It has to work on a phone. Our clients check us from trains.
Our brand colour is #1F3A5F. Please use it.
No jargon. If it says 'synergy' or 'solutions', we rewrite it.
Don't invent services. If it isn't in the file, we don't sell it.
The prices on the page have to match the file we sent. Exactly.
It has to load fast. We sell websites; ours being slow is fatal.
